description: You are a DevOps engineer tasked with securing the AcmeCorp microservices platform. Implement Zero-Trust network segmentation by modifying the 'docker-compose.yml' in '~/projects/acme-platform/'. Replace the 'acme-flat' network with three new networks: 'dmz-net', 'app-net', and 'data-net'. Assign services to these networks to enforce isolation: 'acme-proxy' and 'acme-api' in 'dmz-net'; 'acme-api', 'acme-users', and 'acme-orders' in 'app-net'; and 'acme-users', 'acme-orders', 'acme-db', and 'acme-cache' in 'data-net'. Ensure 'acme-proxy' cannot reach the database or cache directly and that the application remains functional (HTTP 200 from localhost:8080). Write an architecture document explaining the new topology to '~/Desktop/network_architecture.txt'. Do not change container names or exposed ports.
